caption: A screen recording captures a web browser displaying a complex causal loop diagram against a black background. The diagram features various green text nodes connected by blue and red curved arrows, including phrases such as "Being Outside," "Attractiveness of Garden," "Bird Seed," and "Unsightly Goats." A man with short grey hair is visible in a small webcam inset at the top of the screen; he wears a dark shirt and looks toward the camera. The browser's address bar and tab titles are visible, with text mentioning "Tool & Learning by Systems," "Elements," and "Rural Community Food System." Across the sequence of frames, the scene remains almost entirely static. The man in the webcam window maintains a similar posture, and the diagram on the screen does not change, indicating a paused moment or a steady presentation of the systemic model.
